title: StorageTrashRow
description: One trashed entry, as returned by `com.nexus.storage::trash_list`.

deleted_at_ms.description: Unix epoch milliseconds at deletion time.

is_dir.description: Whether the entry is a directory.

original_path.description: Forge-relative path the entry lived at before deletion.

size_bytes.description: Recursive size of the trashed content in bytes.
